debug_info.goal:
u : Scalar52
h : u ≠ ZERO
⊢ ∃ m, u.as_montgomery = ok m ∧ Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] ∧ m ≠ ZERO

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  use m
  constructor
  · exact hm.1
  constructor
  · exact hm.2
  · intro hm_zero
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simp [hm_zero, ZERO_as_Nat]
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := hm.2.trans this
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      have hcoprime := Nat.Coprime.symm coprimeRL
      exact Nat.ModEq.cancel_right_of_coprime hcoprime this
    have : u = ZERO := by
      have := Scalar52_as_Nat_injective_mod_L this
      simp [ZERO_as_Nat] at this
      exact this
    exact h this
